_comments: App-scoped code dashboard for Forms reporting/analytics. DriverClass must match
The Forms application's 'Responses & Analytics' nav item references this record by ID.

fields.Name: Forms Reporting
fields.Description: Response analytics for MJ Forms: summary stats, per-question breakdowns, completion and drop-off funnel, individual response view, and CSV/Excel export.

_comments: App-scoped code dashboard: the first-class Forms home/studio surface (FORMS_BUILD_PLAN §3.2).
default 'Forms' nav item references this record by ID. Selecting a form opens the builder.

fields.Name: Forms
fields.Description: Forms home/studio for MJ Forms: browse all forms, create a new form, author one with AI from a brief, or scaffold from a starter template. Selecting a form opens the visual builder.
